highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 3.119.5 is a servicing release that fixes the WinUI Projection assembly failing to load on .NET 9 consumers.

bullets.lead: WinUI Projection DLL now loads on .NET 9
bullets.detail: Restores packaging of the WinUI projection assembly so .NET 9 apps no longer hit DllNotFoundException when consuming SkiaSharp.Views.WinUI.
